svg.title: Orbit ERD — MongoDB Collection Diagram
svg.desc: Six MongoDB collections for Orbit chat app showing references and embedded subdocuments
svg.text: displayName: String — 2–50 chars, text-indexed for search
passwordHash: String — BCrypt cost 12, null for OAuth
avatarUrl: String — Cloudflare R2 URL, nullable
online: Boolean | lastSeen: ISODate | role: USER | ADMIN
description: String | topicTag: String | visibility: PUBLIC | PRIVATE
memberCount: Number — denormalised, kept in sync by service layer
participantIds: [ ObjectId ] → users._id (2 for DIRECT, N for GROUP)
mutedBy: [ ObjectId ] → users._id (sparse — muted users only)
senderName: String ✱ — snapshot at send time
type: TEXT | IMAGE | FILE | content: String | deleted: Boolean
One entry per member. No uniqueness constraint — enforced by service layer.
content: String ✱ — snapshot at pin time (survives original deletion)
Max 10 pins per group. Content snapshot — not a live reference.
content: String ✱ — snapshot, set to null if last message deleted
Denormalised for conversation list rendering. Null until first message.
messageId: ObjectId — UI deep-link only, NOT used for content retrieval
content: String ✱ — snapshot at reply time, survives original deletion
type: String — snapshot of original message type
Full embedded snapshot. If original deleted, quoted content still shows.
fileId: String — Cloudflare R2 object key
fileName: String | fileSize: Number (bytes) | mimeType: String
url: String — presigned R2 URL, expires 1hr
Null for TEXT type. Refresh expired URL via GET /api/v1/files/{fileId}/url
displayName: String ✱ — snapshot at reaction time
One per userId — enforced via $pull then $push in service layer (no DB constraint).
Grows as participants read. userId added once via $addToSet equivalent.
type: UNREAD_MESSAGE | MENTION | count: Number | read: Boolean
No embedded subdocuments. One doc per user per conversation for UNREAD type.
